sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_regions (id UInt32, area UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_regions VALUES (1, regionToArea(1, 'ua')), (2, regionToArea(2, 'ua'));
SELECT id, regionToArea(id, 'ua') AS area FROM test_regions WHERE area > 0;
UPDATE test_regions SET area = regionToArea(id, 'ua') WHERE area = 0;
SELECT DISTINCT regionToArea(toUInt32(3), 'ua') FROM system.numbers LIMIT 10;
